seoTitle: Senodia News and Updates | Product Releases | BeiLuo Electronics
seoDescription: Stay updated with the latest news from Senodia. New product releases, technology updates, and company announcements.

faqs.question: Where can I find the latest Senodia product announcements?
faqs.answer: Latest product announcements and news are published on the BeiLuo Electronics website. Subscribe to our newsletter or check this news page regularly for updates on new Senodia products and technologies.
faqs.decisionGuide: Check this page regularly or contact our sales team for information on upcoming product releases.

faqs.question: How often does Senodia release new products?
faqs.answer: Senodia regularly releases new MEMS sensors to address evolving market needs. New products are typically announced quarterly, with major product families launched annually. Contact BeiLuo Electronics for the latest product roadmap information.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team for product roadmap and upcoming releases relevant to your applications.

faqs.question: Can I get notified about new Senodia product releases?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can subscribe to BeiLuo Electronics newsletter to receive notifications about new Senodia product releases, technology updates, and promotional offers. Contact our sales team to be added to the notification list.
faqs.decisionGuide: Subscribe to our newsletter or contact sales to receive product release notifications.

news.title: Senodia Releases SCA3300 High-Precision 3-Axis Accelerometer
news.summary: Senodia announces the SCA3300, a high-performance 3-axis accelerometer featuring ultra-low noise of 150μg/√Hz and selectable measurement ranges for consumer and industrial applications.
news.content:
Senodia has expanded its MEMS sensor portfolio with the SCA3300, a high-precision 3-axis accelerometer designed for demanding motion sensing applications. The SCA3300 features selectable measurement ranges of ±2g, ±4g, and ±8g, making it suitable for a wide variety of applications.

Key features include:
- Selectable ranges: ±2g/±4g/±8g
- Ultra-low noise: 150μg/√Hz
- High 14-bit resolution
- I2C and SPI interface support
- Low power consumption: 130μA
- Compact 3mm x 3mm package

The SCA3300 is ideal for smartphones, wearables, IoT devices, game controllers, and industrial vibration monitoring. Its excellent noise performance enables detection of subtle vibrations and precise tilt measurement.

Samples and evaluation kits are available now through BeiLuo Electronics.

news.title: Senodia Expands Automotive-Grade Sensor Portfolio
news.summary: Senodia announces AEC-Q100 qualified accelerometers and gyroscopes for automotive applications including stability control and navigation systems.
news.content:
Senodia continues its expansion into the automotive market with the announcement of AEC-Q100 qualified MEMS sensors. These automotive-grade products meet the stringent quality and reliability requirements of the automotive industry.

The AEC-Q100 qualified products include:
- SCA6300: 3-axis accelerometer for vehicle dynamics
- SCG6300: 3-axis gyroscope for navigation systems
- SIM6300: 6-axis IMU for advanced driver assistance

All automotive-grade products undergo rigorous testing including:
- High temperature operating life (HTOL)
- Temperature cycling
- ESD characterization
- EMC testing

These products are suitable for electronic stability control, navigation systems, tire pressure monitoring, and other automotive applications requiring high reliability.

Contact BeiLuo Electronics for automotive product specifications and support.

news.title: Senodia and BeiLuo Electronics Strengthen Partnership
news.summary: Senodia and BeiLuo Electronics announce expanded distribution agreement to better serve customers across China with enhanced technical support and faster delivery.
news.content:
Senodia and BeiLuo Electronics have announced an expanded distribution partnership to provide comprehensive support for Senodia's MEMS sensors across China. This strengthened partnership brings significant benefits to customers including:

Enhanced Technical Support:
- Dedicated FAE team for Senodia products
- Local technical support in major cities
- Reference designs and application support
- Sensor fusion algorithm assistance

Improved Supply Chain:
- Expanded inventory of popular sensors
- Shorter lead times for production orders
- Local warehousing for faster delivery
- Buffer stock programs for key customers

This partnership reflects Senodia's commitment to the China market and BeiLuo Electronics' expertise in MEMS sensor distribution. Together, we are committed to helping customers achieve design success with Senodia's high-performance sensors.

Contact BeiLuo Electronics to learn more about Senodia products and how we can support your design needs.

news.title: Senodia Introduces Vibration Monitoring Solution for Industrial IoT
news.summary: Senodia launches complete vibration monitoring solution using high-sensitivity accelerometers for predictive maintenance and condition monitoring applications.
news.content:
Senodia has introduced a complete vibration monitoring solution designed for industrial IoT and predictive maintenance applications. The solution leverages Senodia's high-sensitivity accelerometers to detect equipment faults before they cause failures.

Key features:
- High-sensitivity accelerometer with 150μg/√Hz noise
- Wide bandwidth: 0.5Hz to 2kHz
- Complete reference design with schematics and BOM
- Signal processing algorithms for fault detection
- Cloud connectivity for remote monitoring

This solution enables predictive maintenance by detecting bearing wear, misalignment, and other mechanical issues early. It is suitable for pumps, motors, gearboxes, and other rotating equipment.

Evaluation kits are available now through BeiLuo Electronics.
